question: Which political party does Rachida Dati represent as a candidate in the March 2026 Paris municipal elections?
answer: La France Insoumise (LFI) is the party of Sophia Chikirou, but Dati is described as the candidate for the right/union; specifically, she is a former Macronist minister but ran as the candidate for the right-wing union in this context, often associated with Renaissance/Horizons fusion, though the text identifies her as the candidate against whom the withdrawal was a disavowal. The text identifies her as 'Mme Dati' and a candidate. The text does not explicitly name her party in the snippet other than implying the right-wing union, but mentions Marlène Schiappa as 'ex-ministre macroniste'. Dati is the candidate of the right-wing union. The text says 'candidat de la gauche... hors LFI' for Gregoire. For Dati, it implies she is the main right candidate. I will stick to what is explicit: She is the candidate whose list fused with Bournazel's.
